title: Customer-Facing Release Communication
shortDescription: Transform internal release notes into customer-facing changelogs, in-app announcements, or email updates.
jobsToBeDone: Convert internal release notes to customer language
Communicate product value, not implementation details

inputs.label: Internal Release Notes
inputs.example: Added: cohort retention CSV export, onboarding checklist emails. Fixed: promo code edge case for annual plans, timezone bug in scheduled reports. Infra: upgraded deps, refactored data pipelines.

inputs.label: Target Audience
inputs.example: SaaS product managers and growth teams

inputs.label: Output Format
inputs.example: changelog, in-app banner, email subject + preview, social post
